recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.

recommendations.title: Bad Influence

recommendations.title: The Sense of Wonder
recommendations.overview: Louise, a widow with two children, almost crushes a stranger with her car. She takes care of him, even if he's not really wounded. It turns out that he has mental disorders and that they can help each other much more than they thought.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Mainstream
recommendations.overview: A young woman thinks she’s found a path to internet stardom when she starts making YouTube videos with a charismatic stranger  – until the dark side of viral celebrity threatens to ruin them both.
